mapper.select: SELECT ua.user_id, ua.login_id, ua.role, ua.phone, ua.is_active, COALESCE(s.name, p.name) AS user_name, d.dept_code AS department FROM user_account ua LEFT JOIN student s ON s.user_id = ua.user_id LEFT JOIN professor p ON p.user_id = ua.user_id LEFT JOIN department d ON d.dept_id = COALESCE(s.dept_id, p.dept_id) WHERE ua.login_id = #{loginId}
